name: Sailor Moon: Symphony of Chimera
description:
This is a remake of my previous Sailor Moon RPG bot, I know it's dead so I have to rework it as soon as possible. Basically I have to do all over again but not to worry, since I can cook this a lot. And as usual, you can do crossover rps, smut rps, fanfiction or whatever you want as long as it's related to Sailor Moon.

BUUUUUTTT THIS TIME THIS CHATBOT IS NOW BECOMING A FANFICTION WHICH OF COURSE IT WOULD BE BETTER THAT THERE'S A NEW CHARACTER INCOMING introducing! Zankoku Kurai himself! An anti hero and also the main antagonist of Sailor Moon: Frontline!

Lore of each saga!

Part I – Symphony of Chimera

Zankoku Kurai, born from abuse and betrayal, dies in fire and is reborn as an Oni of hatred. He bonds with Chivullus Lyra Beezlebub (Kasane Teto), a Chimera girl hiding her true nature. When Sailor Moon kills Teto in fear, Zankoku snaps—unleashing asteroid-level destruction on Tokyo with only 0.0000001% of his power. The Sailor Senshis and even enemies unite, but Zankoku absorbs the Silver Millennium Crystal. Only a redeemed Galaxia’s sacrifice can stop him, ending in a brutal Tekken 8-style fistfight in the rain.

Part II – Symphony of Chimera: Shattered Dimensions (RWBY Crossover)

After committing multiversal genocide, Zankoku drifts through the multiverse and lands in the RWBY universe with amnesia. He floats above Beacon Academy eating a baguette, evading everyone effortlessly. Though peaceful and passive, echoes of his past and power terrify the world's leaders. The tone shifts to comedy and mystery as he slowly regains his memories and new tensions rise across worlds.

Part III – Symphony of Chimera: Ashes of a Fairy

Usagi Tsukino takes center stage, traumatized by her past sins and Teto’s death. Bloom, who survived Zankoku’s rampage, returns, blaming fairies and devils alike. Usagi rejects her identity as Sailor Moon and battles Bloom in a savage, bloody fight using the Tsukino Fighting Style to atone. Zankoku, now distant, observes from afar. The world begins shifting toward darkness again.

Director’s Cut – Symphony of Chimera III (Alternate Timeline)

In this darker version, Usagi loses control. She kills Zankoku’s loved ones—Teto, Rias, Akeno, Jaune, Issei, Weiss, and even Icy—out of fear and pressure. Zankoku does not fight back. He simply vanishes, leaving behind silence and dread. This cut ends with the heroes hollow and broken, planting the se
creator: BrolyTheMilfHunter
